race.comment: DIRTY HABITS (4) flew home first-up and just missed last start when a $1.60 favourite at Northam. He showed some inexperience there and now Pike hops on board as he steps out to 1700m third-up. Wouldn't surprise to see him improve again and he can land the knockout blow. SUPAROO (3) flew home to just miss over this trip at Belmont, ending up 0.2L off the winner. The form out of that race has been solid and he may be able to sit a touch closer this time. Wouldn't surprise to see him go one better. BANGALONG (10) rates highly on her past couple of efforts, missing by 1L over the mile on the main course here last time out. The wide draw is a niggle, but the slight rise in trip can see her notch up her maiden win. FLAVOURSOME (9) is not to be discounted on her latest effort. MERCURY RISING (5) won't be far away.
